delhi.name: Delhi
delhi.notes: Delhi follows central MV Act 2019 fines with strict enforcement via e-challan system.
local_rules: Odd-Even scheme may apply during pollution emergencies
HSRP plates mandatory
E-challan system active — fines can be paid online at echallan.parivahan.gov.in

maharashtra.name: Maharashtra
maharashtra.notes: Maharashtra reduced some fines from central Act levels via state notification in 2020.
local_rules: Mumbai has dedicated traffic police app for reporting violations
Pune has automated speed cameras on expressway
Maharashtra Traffic Police WhatsApp helpline available

karnataka.name: Karnataka
karnataka.notes: Karnataka largely follows central MV Act 2019 fines.
local_rules: Bangalore Traffic Police uses AI cameras for enforcement
Online challan payment via Karnataka One portal

tamil_nadu.name: Tamil Nadu
tamil_nadu.notes: Tamil Nadu has not fully adopted the enhanced central penalties and maintains lower fines for some violations.
local_rules: Chennai has extensive CCTV network for traffic enforcement
Virtual courts for traffic challan cases

kerala.name: Kerala
kerala.notes: Kerala follows central MV Act fines with active enforcement especially for helmet and drunk driving.
local_rules: Kerala MVD has mobile app for challan tracking
Strict enforcement during festival seasons

uttar_pradesh.name: Uttar Pradesh
uttar_pradesh.notes: UP follows central MV Act 2019 penalties.
local_rules: UP Traffic Police uses e-challan system
Lucknow and Noida have AI-based traffic cameras

rajasthan.name: Rajasthan
rajasthan.notes: Rajasthan reduced some fines from central levels.
local_rules: Jaipur has integrated traffic management system
Rajasthan Transport Department online portal for services

gujarat.name: Gujarat
gujarat.notes: Gujarat reduced fines from central Act levels via state notification.
local_rules: Gujarat strictly enforces prohibition — alcohol consumption itself is illegal
Ahmedabad has BRTS corridor traffic rules

telangana.name: Telangana
telangana.notes: Telangana largely follows central MV Act fines with active e-challan system in Hyderabad.
local_rules: Hyderabad Traffic Police has one of India's most advanced e-challan systems
AI cameras at 100+ junctions in Hyderabad

west_bengal.name: West Bengal
west_bengal.notes: West Bengal significantly reduced fines from central Act levels.
local_rules: Kolkata Police uses e-challan system
West Bengal has among the lowest traffic fines in India

madhya_pradesh.name: Madhya Pradesh
madhya_pradesh.notes: MP follows central MV Act fines.
local_rules: Bhopal and Indore have smart traffic systems

andhra_pradesh.name: Andhra Pradesh
andhra_pradesh.notes: AP follows central MV Act 2019 fines.
local_rules: AP Transport uses DigiLocker integration for documents

punjab.name: Punjab
punjab.notes: Punjab follows central MV Act fines with some local modifications.
local_rules: Punjab Police uses e-challan system
Chandigarh (UT) has separate stricter rules

haryana.name: Haryana
haryana.notes: Haryana follows central MV Act fines.
local_rules: Gurugram has smart traffic management system

bihar.name: Bihar
bihar.notes: Bihar follows central MV Act fines.
local_rules: Patna has e-challan facility

odisha.name: Odisha
odisha.notes: Odisha follows central MV Act fines.
local_rules: Bhubaneswar Smart City has integrated traffic cameras

assam.name: Assam
assam.notes: Assam follows central MV Act fines.
local_rules: Guwahati Traffic Police uses e-challan

jharkhand.name: Jharkhand
jharkhand.notes: Jharkhand follows central MV Act fines.
local_rules: Ranchi has traffic enforcement cameras at key junctions

chhattisgarh.name: Chhattisgarh
chhattisgarh.notes: Chhattisgarh follows central MV Act fines.
local_rules: Raipur has smart traffic signals

uttarakhand.name: Uttarakhand
uttarakhand.notes: Uttarakhand follows central MV Act fines with strict enforcement in hill areas.
local_rules: Special hill driving rules apply on mountain roads
Honking restrictions in eco-sensitive zones

himachal_pradesh.name: Himachal Pradesh
himachal_pradesh.notes: HP follows central fines with additional mountain driving regulations.
local_rules: Right of way rules on narrow hill roads
Snow chain requirements in winter

goa.name: Goa
goa.notes: Goa follows central MV Act fines.
local_rules: Tourist vehicle regulations apply
Two-wheeler rental companies must ensure helmets

jammu_kashmir.name: Jammu & Kashmir
jammu_kashmir.notes: J&K follows central MV Act fines post-2019.
local_rules: Special convoy rules may apply in some areas

tripura.name: Tripura
tripura.notes: Tripura follows central MV Act fines.

meghalaya.name: Meghalaya
meghalaya.notes: Meghalaya follows central MV Act fines.

manipur.name: Manipur
manipur.notes: Manipur follows central MV Act fines.

nagaland.name: Nagaland
nagaland.notes: Nagaland follows central MV Act fines.

mizoram.name: Mizoram
mizoram.notes: Mizoram follows central MV Act fines.

arunachal_pradesh.name: Arunachal Pradesh
arunachal_pradesh.notes: Arunachal Pradesh follows central MV Act fines.

sikkim.name: Sikkim
sikkim.notes: Sikkim follows central MV Act fines.

chandigarh.name: Chandigarh
local_rules: Chandigarh has strict traffic enforcement
E-challan system active

ladakh.name: Ladakh
local_rules: Special permits required for certain routes
